name: Hypermotility Protocols
community_notes: Applies to friendly IMMORTALS and NECRON WARRIORS units: their ranged attacks gain [ASSAULT], and advancing does not prevent the unit from starting an Action.

name: Transdimensional Deployment
community_notes: Applies to friendly TOMB BLADES units: they gain Deep Strike, and their ranged attacks get +1 to Hit in a turn they made an ingress (Deep Strike) move.

name: Empowered Engines
community_notes: Applies to friendly NECRONS TITANIC FLY units: +6" Move.
